resources.string: This app requires a VPN connection to launch.
%1$s requires a VPN connection. Please connect your VPN first.
Enable if your router handles VPN (verified via IP check)
Router VPN not verified — IP check failed
VPN Launcher monitors which apps are opened and blocks VPN-required apps when VPN is not connected.
Moving app — use D-pad to reposition, press OK to drop. Menu button toggles VPN requirement.
Make VPN Launcher your home screen — press OK for setup

To make VPN Launcher your home screen, run this once from a computer on the same network:

adb connect YOUR_IP:5555
adb shell pm grant com.vpnlauncher android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS

Then come back here and press this button again — it will activate automatically.

Your Fire Stick IP: Settings → My Fire TV → About → Network

Enable ADB: Settings → My Fire TV → Developer Options → ADB Debugging → ON

Without this setup, VPN Launcher still works — just open it from your apps list.
